targets.agent_summary: Reviewed `src/dfa.rs`, which implements the DFA variants, their transition lookup, and the builder that determinizes an NFA into a DFA. I found no concrete malicious or supply-chain indicators in this file: there are no install hooks, network/exfiltration calls, credential access, dynamic code loading, obfuscation/deobfuscation, or persistence/environment-tampering behavior.
